name: Chocolatey
description: Windows package manager with 10,000+ packages, enterprise features, and PowerShell-based installation scripts.

seo.title: Chocolatey — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Chocolatey: Windows package manager with 10,000+ packages, enterprise features, and PowerShell-based installation scripts.

when_to_use: Automated Windows dev environment setup via scripts
Enterprise software provisioning with package approval
CI runner setup: install tools with one choco command
Manage 10,000+ Windows packages from a central repo

pros: Largest Windows package catalog by far
Enterprise tier offers self-hosted repo and licensing
Automates installs in CI and imaging workflows
cons: Free tier has rate limits that catch CI by surprise
Package quality varies since many are community-maintained
Security review on community packages is uneven
Enterprise features gated behind paid plans
review.verdict: The default Windows package manager for ops and CI, with caveats around rate limits and quality.
review.best_for: Windows admins and CI pipelines installing third-party tooling at scale.
review.not_for: Developers who prefer the leaner, no-admin Scoop or MSIX flows.
